dependencies.name: Stripe API
dependencies.notes: Payment operations limited by Stripe API rate limits and regional availability.

dependencies.name: SendGrid
dependencies.notes: Email deliverability depends on SendGrid regional routing and ISP behavior.

dependencies.name: AWS ELB
dependencies.notes: Regional load balancer service; misconfiguration can cause outages despite provider SLO.

dependencies.name: Kafka Cluster
dependencies.notes: Cluster health affects notifications and analytics freshness.

dependencies.name: Postgres (Auth DB)
dependencies.notes: Multi-AZ; failover events impact write availability briefly.

dependencies.name: Postgres (Marketplace DB)
dependencies.notes: Primary write load during peak checkout hours.

dependencies.name: Postgres (Payments DB)
dependencies.notes: Stores transaction records and reconciliation state.

dependencies.name: Redis Cluster
dependencies.notes: Evictions and maintenance windows can affect cache hit rate.

dependencies.name: S3 Data Lake
dependencies.notes: Eventual consistency affects pipeline freshness, not raw availability.

dependencies.name: Elasticsearch
dependencies.notes: Indexing backlogs and shard imbalance affect search latency and correctness.
